text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is covered in the ERRATA, which numerous documents relating 
to installation of FreeBSD encourage you to read. :-) 

No matter, go have a look now: 

http://www.freebsd.org/releases/4.0R/errata.html 

A fix is included. ;-)
